title: Home Inspection Day
scene: 你买房，和验房师一起检查房屋。

turns.cn: 我按结构、屋顶、水电顺序查，大概三小时。
turns.en: I'll go structure, roof, then systems. About three hours.

turns.cn: 有问题会当场说吗？
turns.en: Will you flag issues as we go?

turns.cn: 严重的会，完整报告二十四小时内。
turns.en: Major ones yes. Full report within twenty-four hours.

turns.cn: 地下室渗水能查出来吗？
turns.en: Can you check for basement moisture?

turns.cn: 会用湿度计，看排水和地基裂缝。
turns.en: Moisture meter, drainage, and foundation cracks.

turns.cn: 我可以跟着问问题吧？
turns.en: I can follow along and ask questions?

turns.cn: 当然，这是您的房子。
turns.en: Of course. It's your house.

title: Reviewing the Report
scene: 验房报告出来，你和经纪讨论。

turns.cn: 屋顶还有五年寿命，空调偏旧。
turns.en: Roof has about five years left. The AC is aging.

turns.cn: 能要求卖家修还是降价？
turns.en: Can we ask the seller to fix or reduce price?

turns.cn: 可以发 repair request，常见是抵价。
turns.en: We'll send a repair request. Credit at closing is common.

turns.cn: 电箱不合规，这个严重吗？
turns.en: The panel isn't up to code. Is that serious?

turns.cn: 建议卖家修，大概一千五。
turns.en: I'd ask them to fix it. About fifteen hundred.

turns.cn: 验房条款还有三天，抓紧谈。
turns.en: We have three days left on inspection. Let's negotiate fast.

turns.cn: 今晚我就发邮件给卖方经纪。
turns.en: I'll email the listing agent tonight.

title: Pest Inspection
scene: 贷款要求做害虫检查，你和检查员交流。

turns.cn: 我查白蚁、蚁道和老鼠痕迹。
turns.en: I check for termites, mud tubes, and rodent signs.

turns.cn: 车库墙角有木屑，麻烦重点看。
turns.en: There's sawdust in a garage corner. Please look closely.

turns.cn: 可能是旧伤，我打开踢脚线看看。
turns.en: Could be old damage. I'll check behind the baseboard.

turns.cn: 如果有活虫，贷款会停吗？
turns.en: Will the loan stop if there's active infestation?

turns.cn: 通常要处理完并复检才放款。
turns.en: Usually you need treatment and clearance first.

turns.cn: 报告今天能出吗？
turns.en: Can the report come out today?

turns.cn: 两小时内发PDF。
turns.en: PDF within two hours.

title: Radon Test
scene: 验房师建议做氡气检测，你咨询细节。

turns.cn: 这区氡气偏高，建议四十八小时检测。
turns.en: Radon runs high in this area. I recommend a forty-eight-hour test.

turns.cn: 氡气对人体什么危害？
turns.en: What are the health risks?

turns.cn: 长期吸入增加肺癌风险，可装通风系统。
turns.en: Long-term exposure raises lung cancer risk. Mitigation systems help.

turns.cn: 检测费用多少？
turns.en: How much is the test?

turns.cn: 一百五，超标的话谈判安装。
turns.en: A hundred fifty. If it's high, negotiate mitigation.

turns.cn: 做吧，结果出来告诉我。
turns.en: Let's do it. Let me know when results are in.

turns.cn: 检测仪放地下室，别动。
turns.en: I'll place the device in the basement. Don't move it.

title: Rental Move-In Inspection
scene: 你租公寓，入住前和房东一起检查记录。

turns.cn: 我们逐项拍照，避免退租纠纷。
turns.en: We'll photograph everything to avoid disputes at move-out.

turns.cn: 厨房台面这块划痕要记下来。
turns.en: Please note this scratch on the kitchen counter.

turns.cn: 写进清单，不是您造成的。
turns.en: I'll add it to the checklist. Not your fault.

turns.cn: 卧室地毯有污渍。
turns.en: There's a stain on the bedroom carpet.

turns.cn: 入住前会清洗，洗完再签。
turns.en: We'll steam-clean before you sign.

turns.cn: 能给我一份复印件吗？
turns.en: Can I get a copy?

turns.cn: 邮件发您，双方各留一份。
turns.en: I'll email it. We both keep a copy.
